title: My Morning Routine
summary: A simple description of daily habits — present simple, time expressions.
text:
My name is Sara. I am a teacher. Every day I wake up at six o'clock. I drink a glass of water. Then I have breakfast: bread, cheese and coffee. I love coffee.

I go to work by bus. The school is not far from my house. I teach English to children. They are eight or nine years old. I like my students. They are funny.

At one o'clock I eat lunch with my colleagues. We talk about our weekend. After school, I walk in the park with my dog. His name is Max. He is a happy dog.

In the evening I cook dinner. I read a book or I watch TV. I usually go to bed at eleven. I sleep eight hours every night.

questions.q: What time does Sara wake up?
How does Sara go to work?
Who walks in the park with Sara?
How many hours does Sara sleep?
